titleStmt.title: SII 19.52: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 52. (A.R. No. 952 of 1918.) PAḺŪR, TIRUCHIRAPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, SUNDARĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records the re-allotment in certain proportions, to the deities in three shrines, of 10(1/2) mā of the old dēvadāna land belonging to the temple of Nakkar Paramēśvarar of Paḻuvūr in Viḷattūr-nāḍu, and originally intended for the daily supply of 6 nāḻi of rice for offerings to the god in the main shrine (tiruvuṇṇāḻigai).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 3- ṟāvatu viḷattūrnāṭṭup paḻuvūr nakkar koyil parameśvarar paḻan tevatāṉam paṭi yeḻutiyatu tiruvuṇṇāḻikaippuṟam tiruvamu
tukku nicati Arici patteṭṭukkuttal Aṟunāḻippaṭiyāka ceyta nilam teṉtirukkoyil muṉṟumāvum Itaṉ vaṭavāy Iraṇṭumāvum Ittirukkoyil Araikkālum
māka nilam Eṟṟi Araiye Araimā .
Digital edition of SII 19.52 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
